meta.title: Messages and notifications
meta.description: Customer private messaging and notification center for CyberVPN account updates.

title: Messages
description: Review admin-started account conversations, reply inside open threads, and keep unread updates synchronized after reconnects.

privacy.title: Scoped customer channel
privacy.description: Only public messages from conversations assigned to this account are shown here. Internal notes and admin-only channels are never rendered in the customer surface.

list.title: Conversation queue
list.emptyDescription: Admin-started account conversations will appear here when support opens one.

detail.emptyDescription: Choose an existing admin-started thread to read updates or reply.
detail.noMessages: No public messages are available in this conversation.

reply.label: Reply
reply.placeholder: Type your reply for the support team
reply.error: Could not send this reply. Try again.

closed.title: Conversation closed
closed.description: This thread is read-only. Support can reopen it if more action is needed.

archived.title: Conversation archived
archived.description: Archived threads are preserved for reference and cannot accept replies.

locked.title: Conversation locked
locked.description: This thread is locked while support reviews the account context.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptyDescription: Account updates and message alerts will appear here.
